name: ar-lt100-celebration
description: WebAR celebration for 100 weeks consecutive LT presentation milestone

scripts.build: tsc && vite build && npm run copy-assets
scripts.copy-assets: mkdir -p dist/assets && cp -R public/assets/. dist/assets/ && cp public/_headers dist/_headers
scripts.deploy: npm run build && wrangler pages deploy dist --project-name=ar-lt100-celebration

author: Terada Kosuke / Cor.Inc
